     The Numbers Business Report

The Broken Hearts Gallery (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $4,066,487Details
International Box Office $769,112
Worldwide Box Office $4,835,599
Further financial details...

Synopsis

What if you saved a souvenir from every relationship you’ve ever been in? Lucy, a 20-something art gallery assistant living in New York City, who also happens to be an emotional hoarder. After she gets dumped by her latest boyfriend, Lucy is inspired to create The Broken Hearts Gallery, a pop-up space for the items love has left behind. Word of the gallery spreads, encouraging a movement and a fresh start for all the romantics out there, including Lucy herself.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,126,401 (27.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.61 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:84.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,209 opening theaters/2,221 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $5,297,945

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 11th, 2020 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 7th, 2020 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
September 18th, 2020 (Wide), released as Broken Hearts Gallery,m The (Australia)
September 24th, 2020 (Wide) (New Zealand)
September 25th, 2020 (Wide), released as A Galeria dos Corações Partidos (Portugal)
October 23rd, 2020 (Wide) (Romania)
Video Release: November 10th, 2020 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content throughout and some crude references, strong language and drug references.
(Rating bulletin 2634 (Cert #52730), 6/17/2020)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Plot point: Artists, Love Triangle, Relationship Advice, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Tri-Star Pictures, Stage 6 Films, No Trace Camping, Telefilm Canada, Ontario Creates
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English

Synopsis

What if you saved a souvenir from every relationship you’ve ever been in? Lucy, a 20-something art gallery assistant living in New York City, who also happens to be an emotional hoarder. After she gets dumped by her latest boyfriend, Lucy is inspired to create The Broken Hearts Gallery, a pop-up space for the items love has left behind. Word of the gallery spreads, encouraging a movement and a fresh start for all the romantics out there, including Lucy herself.
